Package de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext.adt

This package contains RecodeR Operators which represent algebraic data type functions.

Package de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext.adt Description

This package contains RecodeR Operators which represent algebraic data type functions. (See also the ldt package description.)
